title: CREDIT COUNSELING - 211info
text: NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR CREDIT COUNSELING CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial reviews and education in person, over the phone, or online. Services include: -Credit and debt counseling -Bankruptcy counseling -Housing counseling (pre-purchase, foreclosure prevention, and reverse mortgage) -Student loan debt counseling -Debt management plans -Credit report reviews -Foreclosure information -Tips for first-time veteran and military homebuyers 2033 K Street NW Suite 425 Washington, DC 20006 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 5am-2pm Email - (800) 388-2227 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 388-2227 Toll-free Toll-free (800) 388-2227 Español (844) 359-3825 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Fill out a form online to connected to a counselor. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Bankruptcy Assistance Credit Counseling Debt Consolidation Services Financial Assessment Tools Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Personal Financial Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR CREDIT COUNSELING
